NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PULL'R HOLDING COMPANY, LLC (TRANSACTION ID # 62176889) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLANDER, PETER HEARING SET FOR AUG-15-2018 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-08-2018 CONTINUED TO SEP-26-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER AND DEFENDANT PULL'R HOLDING COMPANY, LLC HAVING AGREED THROUGH THEIR RESPECTIVE COUNSEL THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED PURSUANT TO THE TERMS OF THEIR SETTLEMENT IN THE FORM OF A STIPULATED JUDGMENT. (SEE JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO TERMS OF PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND CONSENT JUDGMENT)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF PETER ENGLANDER'S MOTION TO APPROVE ITS PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT WITH DEFENDANT PULL'R HOLDING COMPANY, LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT COMPLIES WITH THE REQUIREMENTS FOR PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENTS. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, MATTER NOT REPORTED. =(302/HK)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-26-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-07-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment As To Defendant Pull'R Holding Company, Llc
Off Calendar Aug-15-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No apppearance on this matter, the Court adopted the tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff Peter Englander's motion to approve its Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Pull'R Holding Company, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. =(302/HK)
